title: Saath Nibhaana Saathiya
desc: Kokila allows Gopi to observe a fast and tells her to ignore Rashi. Rashi feels jealous when everyone compliments Gopi's saree.

desc: Nandini and Akshara want to see Mohit's parents. Meanwhile, Nandini asks Akshara to post her article, and Gayathri's family give Rajshri and Vishambarnath a warm welcome.

title: Udne Ki Aasha
desc: Paresh sees Sayali getting assaulted by a goon and decides to get her married to Tejas. Renu and Tejas humiliate Paresh for his decision.
